Since her 2022 debut with her breakout song “girlfriend,” fans have been long anticipating this album. Her music has been growing support ever since then, with big names from Grimes to Steve Lacy supporting her work. Multi-time GRAMMY-winning artist Doechii even called hemlock “a rockstar.” With her debut album, hemlocke continues to build success and expand herself sonically. hemlocke springs announces spring tour hemlocke also announced a headlining tour for the album, which surrounds her festival dates at Governors Ball and Bonnaroo, beginning on May 15 in Phoenix. There’s no new NYC date, but she plays Asbury Park, NJ’s The Stone Pony on June 10.
